        <item>
            <title><![CDATA['Controversial' North Korean invasion setting for next Call of Duty game]]></title>
            <description><![CDATA[Developer Infinity Ward said the game will be "grounded in the military authenticity" the series is known for.]]></description>
            <link>https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c9q391y5088o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss</link>
            <guid isPermaLink="false">https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c9q391y5088o#0</guid>

        </item>
        <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Humanoid robots 'the future' of car making, says BMW]]></title>
            <description><![CDATA[BMW is introducing humanoid robots to a car plant in Europe, building on similar projects in the US.]]></description>
            <link>https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cgmpwzzvxr2o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss</link>

        </item>
        <item>
            <title><![CDATA[California Attorney General sues 23andMe successor for 2023 data breach]]></title>
            <description><![CDATA[Attorney General Rob Bonta alleges the company lied about the breach's severity.]]></description>
            <link>https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/crepleq2zyvo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss</link>

        </item>
        <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Valve hikes Steam Deck prices by more than 40%, blaming rising costs]]></title>
            <description><![CDATA[The gaming giant said the handheld had not changed but the rise reflected "the current state of component costs"]]></description>
            <link>https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cz725d5d1x7o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss</link>
            <guid isPermaLink="false">https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cz725d5d1x7o#0</guid>

        </item>
        <item>
            <title><![CDATA[King's College team wins access to cutting-edge Google quantum chip]]></title>
            <description><![CDATA[King's College London researchers hope the chip will help answer previously unanswerable questions about the most important natural processes.]]></description>
            <link>https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cd7pwezyze1o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss</link>

        <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Meta repeatedly snubs EU body over Facebook and Instagram user bans]]></title>
            <description><![CDATA[The BBC has been contacted by hundreds of users who claimed they had been wrongly banned from the sites.]]></description>

        <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Google worker charged with using internal data to make $1.2m on bets]]></title>
            <description><![CDATA[The longtime Google employee was charged in New York for allegedly breaking insider trading laws.]]></description>
            <link>https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c052yv259jvo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss</link>

        </item>
        <item>
            <title><![CDATA[The rise of the fruit that tastes like custard]]></title>
            <description><![CDATA[Custard apple plants are prized for their hardiness but exporting their delicate fruit is difficult.]]></description>

        <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Porn company fined £600,000 by Ofcom over age check failings]]></title>
            <description><![CDATA[Ofcom said Youngtek Solutions Ltd did not have checks between July and September 2025, but has since brought in verification.]]></description>
            <link>https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/clypxw6penno?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss</link>
            <guid isPermaLink="false">https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/clypxw6penno#0</guid>

        <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Champion ethical hacker warns AI tools like Mythos will make competing harder]]></title>
            <description><![CDATA[Chompie, one of the world's tops ethical hackers, says AI like Claude Mythos will make it harder for people like her to compete.]]></description>

            <title><![CDATA[Instagram betting ads featuring Kane and Haaland banned]]></title>
